## Focus this week
<!-- What part of the plan / roadmap phase are we advancing? -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch off `main` (`git switch -c plan/<week>`)
- [ ] Update `plan/index.html` (or add a dated snapshot)
- [ ] Open a PR; review the AI preview comment
- [ ] Capture open questions as `/idea` or a `/poll` in Discord
- [ ] Merge to `main` → changelog posts to Discord
- [ ] Turn decisions into `/todo`s
